title: Mediterranean Frittata
description: A flavorful frittata inspired by the Mediterranean, perfect for a satisfying breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat a tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the xenial and Mediterranean herbs to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt. Pour the egg mixture over the onion and herb mixture in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet and slide it onto a plate.
Cut the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
